name: GCP Artifact Registry legacy image cleanup
__comment__: Remove old GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage / GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage labels and nodes after the RepositoryImage/Image model is loaded. New ingests do not emit these labels.

statements.__comment__: Remove the old scoped image label from RepositoryImage nodes created by transitional versions of the model.
statements.query: MATCH (repo_img:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WITH repo_img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE repo_img:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Remove the old platform image label from canonical Image nodes created by transitional versions of the model.
statements.query: MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WITH img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE img:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete remaining legacy scoped container-image nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
